title: Pre- and Post-stain Protocols for GreenGlo™ Safe DNA Dye, 20,000X in Water
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"4ta2u","text":"    GreenGlo ™, 20,000X in Water, is a non-carcinogenic and non-toxic alternative to Ethidium bromide used for the detection of nucleic acids in agarose gels. It is as sensitive as Ethidium bromide. There is no toxic DMSO as GreenGlo ™ is supplied in water. 
 
GreenGlo ™ has fluorescence excitation maxima at 295 nm and 490 nm. The fluorescence emission maxima is similar to EtBr when bound to DNA – at 530 nm.
  
 Please follow one of the two protocols below, depending on whether you are pre-staining or post-staining.
 
 
 
 ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
